name: spindle
description: Deterministic, testable spec-driven orchestration for Claude Code. The spin CLI is the spine — it never calls a model; it orders, gates, routes, and ledgers the work while slash commands orchestrate Claude around its CLI-enforced gates. Ships 65 routed agents, 24 KB domains, 9 typed gates, model routing (Haiku/Sonnet/Opus), and an adversarial verification loop.
